justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'next Monday at 8 of morning' and 'around 11 AM on Wednesday, May 27th'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial requested slot was unavailable, the agent proactively offered to check for other times on the same day and then successfully found an alternative based on the user's new preference.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process, moving directly to checking availability and then confirming the booking without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any issues or jargon.
